testcase.name: Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-03: Given I am on the empty form, When I view it, Then it shows validation
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-04: Given I am on the email filled but no password, When I view it, Then it shows validation
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-05: Given I am on the password filled but no email, When I view it, Then it shows validation
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-06: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then show password reveals password text
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-07: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then toggle password twice restores masked input
Authentication — form tests (no session needed) › TC-AUTH-08: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then unauthenticated access to /app/home redirects to login
Authentication — requires login › TC-AUTH-01: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then successful login redirects to /app/home
Authentication — requires login › TC-AUTH-02: Given I am on the wrong password, When I view it, Then it shows error message
Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-09: Given I am authenticated, When a session action occurs, Then session persists after page reload
Authentication — session tests › TC-AUTH-10: Given I am logged in, When I log out, Then clears session and redirects to login
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-11: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then forgot password link is visible
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-12: Given the forgot password link is present, When I click the forgot password link, Then it opens the password reset form
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-13: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then password reset form has an email input field
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-14: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows a confirmation or success message
Forgot Password › TC-AUTH-15: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then back to login link is present on the reset password form
Social Login › TC-AUTH-16: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Google or OAuth social login button is visible
Social Login › TC-AUTH-17: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then Facebook or additional OAuth button is visible
Social Login › TC-AUTH-18: Given the social login button initiates a is present, When I click the a social login button initiates a, Then it redirect or opens a popup
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-19: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then sign up link or button is visible
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-20: Given the sign up is present, When I click the sign up, Then it navigates to or opens a signup form
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-21: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then signup form has a name field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-22: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then signup form has an email field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-23: Given I am on the page, When I inspect the content, Then signup form has a password field
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-24: Given I am on the signup form, When I view it, Then it shows a password strength indicator when typing
Sign Up › TC-AUTH-25: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then it shows a confirmation
Security › TC-AUTH-26: Given I am on the multiple wrong password attempts, When I view it, Then it shows a lockout message or CAPTCHA
Security › TC-AUTH-27: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then remember me checkbox is present on the login form
Security › TC-AUTH-28: Given I am on the page, When I interact with the element, Then remember me checkbox can be toggled on and off
